response.body:
{
  "type": "about:blank",
  "title": "Not Acceptable",
  "status": 406,
  "detail": "Set Accept: application/vnd.hmcts.appreg.v1+json.",
  "path": "{{request.path}}",
  "timestamp": "{{now format=\"yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ssXXX\"}}",
  "traceId": "{{randomValue length=12 type='ALPHANUMERIC'}}"
}
